title: The Power of Habit
author: Charles Duhigg
description: Understand and rewire your habits using 4 skills based on the science of cue-routine-reward loops and behavior change.
longDescription: Charles Duhigg reveals that the key to exercising regularly, losing weight, being more productive, and achieving success is understanding how habits work. These skills help you dissect any habit into its components, change bad habits by keeping the cue and reward while swapping the routine, identify keystone habits that create chain reactions, and build willpower as a trainable habit.
